ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is played */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "current_season" TEXT /* Current season */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the division belongs to */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the division */,
  "promotion_spots" INTEGER /* Number of promotion spots to the next higher division */,
  "relegation_spots" INTEGER /* Number of relegation spots to the next lower division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_divisions_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the division the team belongs to */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_code" TEXT /* Short code for the team (e.g., PLY, IPS) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's manager */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the division the match belongs to */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "team1_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "team2_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time the match was played */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., completed, postponed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the division the standing belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the team in the standings */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference */,
  "form" TEXT /* Recent form of the team (e.g., W-D-L) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the standings are applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., Goalkeeper, Defender) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player */,
  "shirt_number" INTEGER /* Shirt number of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "contract_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the player's contract expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the player */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets */,
  "own_goals" INTEGER /* Number of own goals */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the statistics are applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
